features.evidence: 1 port next to that and of course on the end we have our power port so you can charge this of course by usb type c on the right side or you can use the included 200 watt power supply on the left side so this obviously has a very powerful processor and a very powerful graphics card so 200 watts is going to go a long way in powering that now you ll notice there is no ethernet port they know this they re aware that people might want an ethernet port so in the box it comes with a usb type a to ethernet adapter in case you re streaming and you really need the fastest speed and speaking of things in the box it comes with a pretty nice case as well that fits this as well as an optional pen so if you have a pen since this is a touch screen the pen can go on the top of the case moving on let s do the classic one finger hinge test so if i just lift up on this it opens very easily perfectly smoothly i think they really nailed it on this hinge and that s something a lot of laptops genuinely do struggle with so i m impressed by that it has very little wobble if you re typing so it feels stable at any angle and it goes back quite far as well it doesn t go 180 degrees but it goes much further than many laptops out there additionally the one finger closed test again no surprise there it closes perfectly and it goes all the way down until probably about 10 degrees maybe five degrees before it automatically closes so pretty wide range there as well the next reason people really this laptop and i again mentioned this in the beginning of the video is the ability to edit and export photos and videos and any content or maybe if you re an engineer and you re doing 3d designing all the stuff that really requires a lot of heavy lifting on the back end this can handle it despite being the compact size that it is this has an intel core i9 13900h so it s a very powerful processor and it has an nvidia geforce rtx 4070 with eight gigabytes of gddr6 so for anyone who doesn t know what that means it means it s great for a laptop this is really going to be among the best compact laptops that s why it s called pro of course it s going to be great for editing videos and we will get into an exporting test in just a minute between this and a couple other laptops in addition you can have 16 gigabytes or 32 gigabytes of ram just choosing configurations when you re buying it but now let s get into some speed tests video exporting as well as a geekbench test thank you and tying into that previous note this has a really compact size with a great display a full terabyte ssd on here the h series intel i9 the nvidia rtx 4070 and all of that in a compact laptop it s not the thinnest laptop out there but it s probably the thinnest laptop with this power it s only 3 However, well this has a 75 whr battery and you get a 65 watt type c pd charger along with it which is great but what s insane is that we got a battery life of around 10 12 hours in day to day usage involving lots of chrome, slack, notion, lots of youtube and that is insane considering windows laptop standards

this is the new asus zenbook pro and i wanted to find out why this was selling out absolutely everywhere after using it for the past week it s finally clear to me let me explain so this laptop comes in a few configurations but they re all pretty stacked with a powerful processor a powerful graphics card and offering a very very accurate display which personally really intrigued me you see there are seven main things that people about this laptop now i was fortunate enough to get my hands on this laptop this is the 14 inch oled laptop to ux 6404 when the folks at asus agreed to send me one and partner up for this video and of course all opinions are my own but we want to keep this completely unbiased so i m going to show you actual testing throughout this video i have a lot of different tests and some of the results might really surprise you so seven things that people really about this laptop so the first one without a doubt has to be the display now people might say that about a lot of different laptops maybe they look good maybe the fast refresh rate but this one in particular is especially great for creators so i ll show some color specs on screen i m not going to read through all of them but it s pantone validated for color accuracy and probably the biggest one in my opinion is the 100 dci p3 rating which gives you incredible color accuracy it s an oled nano edge touch screen so touch screen which is nice but also oled is going to give you better contrast you re getting really nice colors on here and it s a 14 and a half inch display which for me is a perfect balance of a very usable display so it s not a little 13 inch but it s also very portable i can fly with this i can throw in the backpack it s not too heavy and it really works in every environment i would use it in in addition the aspect ratio it s 2880 by 1800 that s the resolution of the screen which gives you that 16 by 10 aspect ratio which is just a little bit taller than some of the older laptops so again you re getting a little bit more real estate that it feels so usable despite being less than 15 inches so those all add up to make it very very usable and of course it s 120hz and you re getting really nice clean images regardless of the brightness you re using i can t emphasize enough especially as somebody who edits photos and videos i thumbnails all the different stuff that i m creating and editing color accuracy on a laptop just goes a really long way which is why a lot of creators are going to this laptop now number two this is more of a unique feature that a lot of competitors obviously just don t have and this is the asus dial pad so this is a creator centric design but it s also highly effective for engineering in other professions and so this little digital dial pad is on the trackpad and it s optional as well so you can use the trackpad as a normal trackpad but if you swipe from the top right down and in it ll enable this and you can turn it on and you can customize this for different applications you re running and no matter what you re running you can really do a lot with this so if i m doing adobe premiere pro i can swirl this to change the timeline i could do audio things i can change all types of things that i preset for this little dial pad so if you re somebody that uses photoshop a lot and there s specific tools that you always have to go and open and use them you could possibly program those with the dial pad to just make your workflow a little bit more seamless moving on to number three i realize i haven t properly introduced this laptop and given you a physical tour but number three are the ports so it has pretty much every port you will be needing as a content creator going around the outside on the right side of course we ve got our two little leds that are indicators we have our sd card slot this is a full size st which means you don t need to have an adapter for your camera you can just use full size in here which is nice i should note that when you put the sd card in it doesn t go all the way flush full size sd cards typically don t so that s pretty pretty expected then we have a usb type c second gen we also have a thunderbolt 4 port on here and on the back this is quad vented so it should be cooling pretty easily moving over to the left side we have a three and a half millimeter audio port for headphone and microphone use usage we have a second gen usb type a port we have an hdmi 2

through all of them but it s pantone validated for color accuracy and probably the biggest one in my opinion is the 100 dci p3 rating which gives you incredible color accuracy it s an oled nano edge creating and editing color accuracy on a laptop just goes a really long way which is why a lot of creators are going to this laptop now number two this is more of a unique feature that a lot of competitors obviously just don t have and this is the asus dial pad so this is a creator centric design but it s also highly effective for engineering in other professions and so this little digital dial pad is on the trackpad and it s optional as well so you can use the trackpad as a normal trackpad but if you swipe from the top right down and in it ll enable this and you can turn it on and you can customize this for different applications you re running and no matter what you re running you can really do a lot with this so if i m doing adobe premiere pro i can swirl this to change the timeline i could do audio things i can change all types of things that i preset for this little dial pad so if you re somebody that uses photoshop a lot and there s specific tools that you always have to go and open and use them you could possibly program those with the dial pad to just make your workflow a little bit more seamless moving on to number three i realize i haven t properly introduced we ve got our two little leds that are indicators we have our sd card slot this is a full size st which means you don t need to have an adapter for your camera you can just use full size in here which is nice i should note that when you put the sd card in it doesn t go all the way flush full size sd cards typically don t so that s pretty pretty expected then we have a usb type c second gen we also have a thunderbolt 4 port on here and on the back this is quad vented so it should be cooling pretty easily moving over to the left side we have a three and a half millimeter audio port for headphone and microphone use usage we have a second gen usb type a port we have an hdmi 2

all right what do we i think we re at number six on this list the number six reason that people are going to be probably drawn to this laptop the sixth thing you need to know is the keyboard on here is quite impressive so you have a backlit keyboard it s a variable backlighting as well they re very tactile keys so i ll get into a typing speed test but you can also hear just the typing sound i ll put my microphone closer so you can hear that so during that typing test i got 91 words per minute using monkey type which is pretty average for me i usually get between about 82 and 100 so the keyboard here is definitely easy to get used to nice tactile feel on the keys and overall it doesn t feel mushy they have a nice mechanical feel to them they have nice travel they don t feel mushy they feel a much larger more mechanical keyboard but they re still a pretty slim profile it s a laptop obviously so that is undoubtedly an impressive keyboard in my opinion the trackpad is a pretty comfortable size and shape it s a physical touch pad i should mention that it s not a haptic one so you will have to click or if you just tap obviously that works too but if you want that feedback you have to push down a little bit harder to get that physical click on there and for some people that s going to be exactly what you want and then moving on to number seven these are the asus advanced controls that they have for the fan the performance and things that so let s get into a fan test i m gonna max this out and see if you re doing the absolute most for this what does it look what does it sound and how does it perform all right so we are in perfect mode i m exporting a video just to do a fan test and i was clocking about 42 decibels at about 12 inches away so definitely not silent when you re exporting this is obviously using a lot of power but as you can see it s not the loudest laptop i ve seen out there and it generally only does this when you re exporting or doing some really heavy lifting for most use it s totally silent but besides those seven things there are a couple extra things i noticed the first one i was pleasantly surprised that there was almost no bloatware on this at all so when i opened it you have a couple of asus apps but they re quite useful you have mcafee on here which every windows laptop comes with but other than that you re not getting a lot of junk on here and i really that because as a creator i m going to install my own software on here pretty much right away and i don t want notifications to distract me the second thing i notice is the battery life on here you re getting about eight to nine hours with video playback which is which pretty much middle of the pack this is obviously a very powerful laptop so you ll be you ll probably be plugging it in if you re doing any heavy lifting on here but if you re editing on the go you can still get the job done and considering the size and the specs the lap the battery life is definitely passable there are two drawbacks i noticed however one of them is that all the usb type c ports are on the right side so if i have two monitors which i do and i wanted to plug them both in by type c they both have to wrap around and one of them just couldn t quite reach so i had to use hdmi for that one but regardless if you want to charge for example and you only have a type c cable you ll always have to go over to the right side the second drawback i really the look and the aesthetics of this laptop but it s definitely a fingerprint magnet you re going to be you re going to be cleaning this off pretty frequently it you can see it right there it definitely gets it gets it gets some smudges now the price of this is 17

creating and editing color accuracy on a laptop just goes a really long way which is why a lot of creators are going to this laptop now number two this is more of a unique feature that a lot of competitors obviously just don t have and this is the asus dial pad so this is a creator centric design but it s also highly effective for engineering in other professions and so this little digital dial pad is on the trackpad and it s optional as well so you can use the trackpad as a normal trackpad but if you swipe from the top right down and in it ll enable this and you can turn it on and you can customize this for different applications you re running and no matter what you re running you can really do a lot with this so if i m doing adobe premiere pro i can swirl this to change the timeline i could do audio things i can change all types of things that i preset for this little dial pad so if you re somebody that uses photoshop a lot and there s specific tools that you always have to go and open and use them you could possibly program those with the dial pad to just make your workflow a little bit more seamless moving on to number three i realize i haven t properly introduced this laptop and given you a physical tour but number three are the ports so it has pretty much every port you will be needing as a content creator going around the outside on the right side of course we ve got our two little leds that are indicators we have our sd card slot this is a full size st which means you don t need to have an adapter for your camera you can just use full size in here which is nice i should note that when you put the sd card in it doesn t go all the way flush full size sd cards typically don t so that s pretty pretty expected then we have a usb type c second gen we also have a thunderbolt 4 port on here and on the back this is quad vented so it should be cooling pretty easily moving over to the left side we have a three and a half millimeter audio port for headphone and microphone use usage we have a second gen usb type a port we have an hdmi 2
